def positive_metric_or_span_labels_use_high_cardinality_raw_inputs():
    rule_id = "metric_or_span_labels_use_high_cardinality_raw_inputs"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag labels or attributes built from raw IDs, paths, or user-provided values."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
